heading: Omitted
label: 609b Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to authorized uses of funds appropriated to pay certain judgments to the Yakima Tribes of the Yakima Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 91–413, § 184 Stat. 865Sept. 25, 1970
